headline: 3 Reasons MET is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: MetLife trades at $84.06 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 10.1% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 9.7%.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on MetLife, Raises Price Target to $86
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst John Barnidge   maintains MetLife (NYSE:MET) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $81 to $86.
